title: JIT IR translation — type tests and guards
purpose: Guard tests (is_integer, is_atom, is_tuple, test_arity, is_tagged_tuple) are in the hot path of every pattern match. JIT-compiling these avoids the dispatch overhead of the interpreter loop for each guard.
task: Translate type test and guard opcodes to Cranelift IR.

requirements.title: Type test IR
requirements.spec: Translate is_integer, is_atom, is_tuple, is_list, is_binary, is_float, is_pid to native tag checks.
acceptance: Type tests compile to bitwise AND on the Term tag bits + compare
Branch to fail label on type mismatch
Test: compiled is_integer correctly distinguishes integers from atoms

requirements.title: Guard BIF IR
requirements.spec: Translate test_arity, is_tagged_tuple, and select_val to IR.
acceptance: test_arity compiles to tuple header read + arity compare
is_tagged_tuple compiles to tuple check + arity check + element 0 compare
select_val compiles to a jump table or binary search
Test: compiled pattern match on {ok, Value} works correctly

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement gc_bif guard translation — those need GC safepoints
SHALL NOT implement float guard translation — use interpreter fallback
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
